other_observers: Beth Dillon; Beth Dillon is the original finder and reporter of this bird.
description: A medium-sized dove, pale brownish on folded wings, with darker primaries; gray wash on rump area (lower back), vent area cream colored; underside of tail about two thirds black, one third white (at tip); head pale brown with blue skin between dark-gray bill and orange-red eye, including orbital; a black comma on lower auricular.  Tail shape difficult to assess with the angle of view (see photos).  A narrow strip of white could be observed at the tips of some secondary feathers on the resting wing (see photos).Behaviors: Sitting on branch restingCall: did not vocalizePlumage: adult
